plans.title: Rank4AI Blog Strategy
plans.excerpt:
# Rank4AI Blog Strategy

## Why: The Duda Data (858,000 SMB websites, Feb 2026)

Each additional blog post increases AI crawler visits by 7%.
Each additional page increases crawler visits by 4%.
Sites with 4+ AI optimisations get 1,600% more human traffic.
AI-crawled sites get 3.2x more traffic, 2.7x more leads.

More content = more crawler visits = more AI visibility = more leads.

## Current State
- 123 blog posts
- 973 total pages
- Blogs mostly 400-650 words
- Topics: AI search education, platform guides, competitor analysis

## Blog Frequency

**Target: 3 blogs per week (Monday, Wednesday, Friday)**

Not daily. Quality over quantity. Each post should be:
- 600-800 words minimum
- Structured for AI extraction (answer-first, clear headings, citable facts)
- Internally linked to 2-3 relevant pages
- Has a clear search intent it targets
- Written in Adam's voice (direct, no jargon, UK-focused)

## Blog Categories (rotating)

### Monday: Commercial / Service blogs
These drive leads. Topics that prospects search for:
- "How much does AI search cost"
- "What does an AI search agency do"
- "Do I need AI SEO if I rank on Google"
- "When should I start AI search work"
- Service comparisons, pricing discussions, process explanations

### Wednesday: Research / Data blogs
These build authority and get cited. Topics backed by our data:
- Stats from the 1,400+ audits
- Platform-specific findings
- Industry benchmarks
- Trends and changes
- Original analysis AI platforms can cite

### F

# Rank4AI Daily Content Plan

## Automated (already running)
- **5 questions/day** via `run_questions.py` (11:59am)
- **1 blog/day** via `run_blogs.py` (12:30pm)

## Manual additions (Claude Code sessions)

### Weekly Target: 10 new pages
- 2 ranking/listicle pages
- 2 comparison/vs pages
- 2 stats pages

plans.title: Rank4AI Document Suite Plan
plans.excerpt:
# Rank4AI Document Suite Plan

## Current Documents (what exists)

| Doc | Format | Audience | Status |
|-----|--------|----------|--------|
| What We Do for Clients | MD | Clients | Outdated - old service structure, needs rewriting |
| Audit Methodology | PDF | Partners (Footprint) | Client-specific, needs generic version |
| Partner Overview | PDF | Partners (Footprint) | Good structure, needs updating with new pricing/services |
| Diesel Advisory Proposal | PDF | Client (Diesel Gym) | Good example of advisory proposal |

## What's Needed — Full Document Suite

### TIER 1: Sales (prospects who've never heard of you)

**1.1 — One-Page Overview**
- Audience: Cold prospects, networking, events
- Purpose: "What is Rank4AI?" in 60 seconds
- Content: Who we are, what we do, the problem, the 5 signals, CTA
- Length: 1 page
- Source: Pull from homepage + partner overview intro

**1.2 — Service Guide**
- Audience: Warm prospects considering working with you
- Purpose: Explain the three paths and pricing clearly
- Content: Audit → Ecosystem → Full Agency → Advisory. What each includes, pricing, timeline, what to expect
- Length: 3-4 pages
- Source: Rewrite from "What We Do" doc + website pricing page

**1.3 — Case Study Template**
- Audience: Prospects who want proof
- Purpose: Before/after with real numbers
- Content: Client situation, what we did, results (AI visibility scores, platform citations, traffic)
- Length: 1-2 pages per case study
- Source: New - build from existing clien

plans.title: AI SEARCH COMPARISON SITE — MASTER PLAN
plans.excerpt:
# AI SEARCH COMPARISON SITE — MASTER PLAN
## compareaiseo.com — Lead Gen + "Best Of" Site for AI Search/SEO/GEO
### Date: 6 April 2026

---

# PART 1: THE OPPORTUNITY

## Why This Is Wide Open

Every other vertical has comparison sites. Car insurance has GoCompare. Broadband has Uswitch. Solar has GreenMatch. But AI search optimisation — a market every business will need — has **zero dedicated comparison sites**.

What exists today:
- **First Page Sage** publishes "best of" lists but they're an agency selling their own services
- **Onely** has a blog post ranking "best AI SEO agencies" — it's a single article
- **SemNexus, Aimers, Thrive** — same pattern: single blog posts, not dedicated comparison sites
- **Nobody** has built a standalone, independent-looking comparison site for this space

The agencies writing these lists are promoting themselves. There is no independent comparison hub. That's the gap.

## Why Now

- AI search optimisation is a **brand new market** — every business will need it
- 48% of all Google search queries now show AI Overviews
- ChatGPT processes 2.5 billion prompts daily, 65% qualifying as search behaviour
- Gartner predicts traditional search volume drops 25% by 2026
- The agencies, tools, and services in this space are multiplying fast but **no one is comparing them**
- First mover advantage is massive — whoever builds THE comparison site owns the narrative

## What We're Building

An independent-looking Astro comparison site on compareaiseo.com t

# CompareAISEO — 30-Day Daily Content Plan
## Start date: Day after launch
### Updated: 7 April 2026 (with gap analysis from 65+ publisher audit)

2. **Head-to-head tool reviews** — Otterly vs Peec vs Scrunch (zero exist)

7. **AI platform recommendation patterns by industry** — nobody has studied this

9. **Agency pricing calculator** — interactive tool
10. **Google AI Mode vs AI Overviews** — barely explained anywhere
